hooks.command: sh -c 'script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/codex-session-memory/*/hooks/session_start.py" -type f | sort | tail -n 1); if [ -n "$script" ]; then exec python3 "$script"; fi'

sh -c 'script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/codex-session-memory/*/hooks/stop.py" -type f | sort | tail -n 1); if [ -n "$script" ]; then exec python3 "$script"; else printf "%s\n" "{\"decision\":\"approve\"}"; fi'
sh -c 'script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/codex-session-memory/*/hooks/post_tool_use.py" -type f | sort | tail -n 1); if [ -n "$script" ]; then exec python3 "$script"; fi'
